Time is running out before our critical FEC fundraising deadline on Monday -- and we're behind where we need to be to hit our end-of-quarter goal.

Our campaign doesn't take a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because this grassroots movement is about people, not powerful special interests.

That means whether or not we reach our fundraising goal depends on people like you reading emails like this one and chipping in what they can to help power this campaign in the weeks and months ahead.

**[We only need 246 more contributions today from Pennsylvania to get back on track to reach our goal and show the strength of this grassroots movement on the public FEC report. name: Shailene Woodley
subject: the unlimited special interest money of corporate Democrats and their fossil fuel donors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| In what was likely the largest climate protest in history, an estimated 4 million people came out worldwide for the climate strike this month to demand that our leaders stop failing us and start taking action to prevent a climate crisis-generated mass extinction.

**Lives all over the world are at stake, and if we don 't elect a president who will listen to scientists instead of corporate donors, the death toll will be too horrific to contemplate.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you personally, friend. We need your help to make sure that the truth about the climate crisis isn't drowned out by the unlimited special interest money of corporate Democrats and their fossil fuel donors.

[Can I count on you to donate now to make sure that we elect leaders all over the country who believe in science, not corporate politicians who endanger every living being on earth?](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_sept19?amount=27&recurring=true&email=&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+donate+now+to+make&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2&source=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

---
How can Americans be expected to trust corporate-funded politicians when they openly hold fundraisers with fossil fuel executives and proudly kill the DNC climate debate?

The answer is clear: we can't trust them to have our best interests at heart.

That's why I've dedicated my time and effort to ensure that Our Revolution has the resources to effectively organize to fight back against corporate climate propaganda and win. We won a permanent Climate Crisis Council at the Democratic National Committee, and we want to keep winning.

[Click here to help Our Revolution expose the big and little lies that corporate-funded politicians use to minimize the climate crisis.](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_sept19?amount=27&recurring=true&email=&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+Click+here+to+help+Our+Revolution+expose&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2&source=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2")

Do something about the climate crisis: [https://go.ourrevolution.com/0919-eoq](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_sept19?amount=27&recurring=true&email=&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-+httpsgoourrevolutioncom0919eoq&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2&source=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2")

Thank you for being on the right side of history.

Shailene Woodley
Board Member, Our Revolution

* * *

[Support Our Revolution ->](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/footer-2019?amount=27&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=9+-+Support+Our+Revolution+rarr&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2&source=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2")

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. >From city halls to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party and get big money out of politics. **[Help us achieve these goals by donating today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a252/bed43eb/a31b0485/75f88681/3183758294/VEsHBg/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/footer-2019?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=13+-+Help+us+achieve+these+goals+by+donating+&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2&source=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2")**

Join our movement by **[following us on Facebook](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a252/bed43eb/a31b0485/75f88680/3183758294/VEsHAQ/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://www.facebook.com/PoliticalRevolution?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=14+-+following+us+on+Facebook&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2&source=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2")** and **[signing up here to volunteer.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a252/bed43eb/a31b0485/75f88683/3183758294/VEsHAA/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/membership-signup?source=email-footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=15+-+signing+up+here+to+volunteer&utm_campaign=OR_EM_FR_90DO_190928_2_2")**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I wouldn’t have to send you this email if…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Candidates running for office shouldn’t have to beg mega-wealthy individuals and corporations for money.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=907%2E377263%2EbNRYI5) Yang Gang --

Candidates running for office shouldn’t have to beg mega-wealthy individuals and corporations for money. If we implemented my policy of Democracy Dollars, every American would have $100 to give to their favorite candidate. Imagine how empowering that would feel.

If I’m elected president -- that will be one of the policies I will implement to restore trust in our democracy. [ **Until then, I have to send you this email and I have to ask you donate to my campaign. So, will you?** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11789?t=5&akid=907%2E377263%2EbNRYI5) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11789?t=13&akid=907%2E377263%2EbNRYI5)
---
**If the Yang Gang had Democracy Dollars, we would have already blown our $1.5 million dollar goal out of the water and then some!**

Democracy Dollars would eliminate the influence of corporations and lobbyists on our elections. Just 10,000 supporters would mean $1 million for a campaign. Calling rich people for money is soul-crushing. We’d all be better off if politicians only needed to worry about representing the people that elected them.

But the reality is right now that I have to ask for donations to meet our critical fundraising goals. [ **Can you chip in before the FEC filing deadline on Monday at midnight?** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11789?t=12&akid=907%2E377263%2EbNRYI5)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/11789?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=907%2E377263%2EbNRYI5)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Time is running out….. ⏳
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? subject: It's important, Friend

body:
I know you receive a lot of emails, but this is different. | **DEADLINE:_T -1 Day_**
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/52933329:sjlk3XwNB:m:1:2159797350:D8D272B9F3BE4960903A3227AAB9720C:r)
---
Friend,

I know you receive a lot of urgent requests, but this is different.

I'm facing a _major fundraising deadline tomorrow night_ , and I'm not where I need to be. By the time the weekend's over, I'll be out of time, and what happens between now and then will determine if I'm ahead of schedule or behind.

**[With what we've seen from Democrats lately, it's even more critical that I stay on track so I can't continue pushing back of their radicalism.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/52933329:sjlk3XwNB:m:1:2159797350:D8D272B9F3BE4960903A3227AAB9720C:r)**

**_BEFORE MONDAY NIGHT:_**
| [** CONTRIBUTE » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/52933329:sjlk3XwNB:m:1:2159797350:D8D272B9F3BE4960903A3227AAB9720C:r)
---

The Left is rabid at the thought of turning the Senate blue, and that's a worst-case scenario in my opinion. We've seen the kind of radicalism and obstruction Democrats are waging in Washington, and the extreme agenda they're pushing on the campaign trail.

**[Their leftist postions are out of control and we cannot allow them to hijack the Senate.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/52933329:sjlk3XwNB:m:1:2159797350:D8D272B9F3BE4960903A3227AAB9720C:r)**

I'm fighting against their extremism in Washington every day, but if they think I'm vulnerable in Arkansas, they're going to come after me twice as hard in DC and back at home.

**[Together, I know we can force them to back down, but only if I hit my quarterly goal this weekend.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/52933329:sjlk3XwNB:m:1:2159797350:D8D272B9F3BE4960903A3227AAB9720C:r)**

Thank you in advance for your support. I couldn't do it without you, Friend.

In Service,

Tom Cotton
United States Senator

**_BEFORE MONDAY NIGHT:_**

[** CONTRIBUTE » **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/52933329:sjlk3XwNB:m:1:2159797350:D8D272B9F3BE4960903A3227AAB9720C:r)

clean_body: Peter, We are just one day away from a critical deadline: the most important fundraising report of the election will only count donations through September 30. After our near victory in 2018, we have been hard at work laying the necessary foundation to finish the job. We are registering voters, talking to folks about the issues that matter, and building a volunteer operation that will flip this district once and for all. Your donation is going to help us get it done. We turned this district from a “safe” Republican seat into a national battleground — thanks to people like you. People who stood up and decided we need real representation in Washington. Michael McCaul is out of touch. He spends more time traveling in limousines than meeting the people of this district. He’s more concerned with his personal ambitions than fighting to keep hospitals open and making sure we have clean drinking water. We can do so much better. I have fought for people’s rights my entire career as a public school teacher and civil rights attorney. I will spend every day in Congress fighting for you — but I need your help to get there. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

clean_body: | I hate to be so direct, but we're down to the wire. This Adam’s first public filing and he really needs to put up the big numbers now to help us gain the momentum that we’ll need to come out on top at the other side of this primary -- let alone on Election Day. Adam is a great candidate, Peter. I know you don’t always get to see the work he’s putting in like we do here at HQ, but he’s truly committed to uplifting the people of our district and improving the lives of Florida families. body:
Dear Peter,
[**36 hours until this first fundraising quarter ends**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10392979/104382565/1915874746?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDA0NTJhOS1kOGUyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nxcQ1UQSdYtU5LULV64NuiniZZZCiOLQrEfb45oOTyY=&refcode=em0929p1). name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

I'm
so grateful to all of you who have already made a contribution at the
close of the most important quarter yet.

People want to know if this is a campaign on the rise, and if they too
should join us in this fight. When you make a contribution — or for some
of you an additional contribution — it really helps them see that their
support can make a difference, and that they'll find themselves in good
company. It lifts our momentum.

From the beginning we said we’d only take money from people. Not a dime
from PACs. Not a dime from corporations or lobbyists. It's the best way to
run, and the best way to win. Ultimately, it’s how we are going to make a
clear contrast with a president who caters to these special interests.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36145?refcode=ema20190929-58144&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=58144%2E444211%2EmfZlL3 ]We are trying to reach a goal of $750,000. Can I count on your support
before our FEC deadline at midnight tomorrow? Even if you can only give a
little bit, it all adds up.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/36145?refcode=ema20190929-58144&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=58144%2E444211%2EmfZlL3 ]Contribute $3

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Beto O'Rourke

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: If you support Tina, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Each of our members counts if we're going to take back the Senate. Our path to victory runs through Minnesota, and we can't let Tina fall behind on this FEC deadline. Can you help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929schumer-opn&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

I'm going to be blunt with you: Flipping the Senate depends on defending Minnesota.

_NBC_ recently listed Minnesota as one of its top five vulnerable Democratic seats. So I'm making sure everyone who supports Tina is laser-focused on helping her win -- because keeping Senator Mitch McConnell as majority leader is not an option.

**And Tina does need our help -- her opponent, Jason Lewis, is exactly the type of candidate that Mitch McConnell is putting his money behind.** He is extreme and will vote lock-step with the rest of the GOP.

I'm working hard to win back the Senate for Democrats this election, and defending Tina is one of my top priorities. **That's why I am asking for your help before the tomorrow's deadline to make sure that we keep Tina in the Senate.**

**[We cannot lose Tina in the Senate. Please contribute $10 before the September 30 deadline so we can defend Minnesota's Senate seat.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929schumer-opn&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc411c9/c1f7015/674fe739/1145b21d/3835096464/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkyOXNjaHVtZXItb3BuIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929schumer-opn-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

Whoever controls the Senate, controls the future of the Supreme Court, the future of women's rights, the future of health care, and so much more.

Whether it is protecting people with pre-existing conditions or fighting for climate change solutions, there is too much important work left on the table. And across the board, Tina has been of one of our toughest fighters.

**Our path to a Democratic majority in the Senate runs through Minnesota.

[If you are with me in retaking the Senate for Democrats -- I need you to contribute $10 to Tina before tomorrow's FEC deadline. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929schumer-opn&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,

Chuck
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929schumer-opn-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Team Franken
subject: one day left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We still need thousands before midnight tomorrow to reach our goal, and we need your support right now if we're going to make it happen. Can we count on you?
|
---

| | Friends -- It's been several days since Mike became the first Democrat in this race to call for impeachment proceedings into President Trump, and our grassroots list keeps growing. That's good -- because we could really use the help. Tomorrow night is the first public fundraising deadline of this campaign. It's our first chance to show the pundits and the doubters that we've built a strong, grassroots campaign that's going to be a real force in this race. [**We need $7,500 before midnight tomorrow to reach our goal, and we need your support right now if we're going to make it happen. name: Bruce Sinclair, Campaign Manager
subject: We are still way behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Tomorrow is the most important moment of this campaign to date. At midnight, we have our first FEC deadline since a former GOP congressman announced he's challenging Mark. It's also when we find out w
|
---
| | Derek,

Tomorrow is the most important moment of this campaign to date. At midnight, we have our first FEC deadline since a former GOP congressman announced he's challenging Mark. It's also when we find out whether we hit our quarterly fundraising goal...or fell short.

I'm really hoping that doesn't happen. That's because these milestones are what we use to set budgets for hiring staff, opening campaign offices, running ads, and executing the voter mobilization strategy we'll need to turn out voters and win in 2020.

**But right now we are still way behind on our $40,000 grassroots goal that we've set for this quarter. Like I said, this is the big one for Mark Warner and this campaign, so I want to personally ask you to make a contribution to help us hit our goal. Will you chip in now?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0bb/53d9897e/524e46c6/1c8e1c9c/2334989987/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20190929nd__252__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0bb/53d9897e/524e46c6/1c8e1c87/2334989987/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190929nd__252__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** I'm so proud of the campaign we've built so far, because it's powered by grassroots supporters like you who are helping to make a change in Virginia. And I'm proud of Senator Warner, too, because he's fighting for us in Washington at a critical moment in our country's history.

I want him to be able to focus on that important work. That's why it's so important that we work together to keep this campaign on track, so Mark can win in 2020 and send Donald Trump and his GOP candidates packing. That's what this is all about.

[**Unfortunately, we're still behind on our crucial fundraising goal. But if folks like you chip in $5 or $10, or whatever you can afford, I know we can hit it by tomorrow. Please, Derek, give what you can today to help Mark Warner keep up the fight for us in the Senate.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0bb/53d9897e/524e46c6/1c8e1c86/2334989987/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-septeoq?refcode=20190929nd__252__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") Thanks,

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump wants to pollute our water
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The Trump administration announced that they will roll back Obama-era regulations designed to protect the nation's waterways from conversion into farm fields \-- in effect giving companies more leeway to destroy our wetlands and rivers. This decision will have disastrous consequences on our environment \-- we've already seen what happens when there are no regulations. Between the 1780s and 1980s, half of our wetlands and waterways were drained and destroyed, endangering critical animal habitats and clean drinking water. This is just the most recent in a slew of environmental protection rollbacks undertaken by the U.S. government \-- they've weakened the Endangered Species Act, allowed for greater methane pollution, and tried to prevent government officials from discussing climate change. We're investigating what engaged voters think about this issue and need 129 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Should the government protect our waterways from pollution and destruction?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2c/6e9863e8/150066cb/1db0d237/3177972851/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/jErp9PcU") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2c/6e9863e8/150066cb/1db0d237/3177972851/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/jErp9PcU") Thank you for your response. -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2c/6e9863e8/150066cb/1db0d236/3177972851/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190929a.ND-b&refcode2=AAfvHCKPEw9LdEMWY4x6")

name: Margaret Good
subject: really simple
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
Many of you have asked me why I'm running for Congress. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
Friends,

Many of you have asked me why I'm running for Congress.

With our [**first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) approaching tomorrow, I want to ask for your support, but before I do, let me lay it all on the line for you.

**Our opponent, Vern Buchanan, has spent the past 12 years in office taking votes that have hurt a lot of people. Simply put, he does not vote in our best interest:**

| **On health care:**
He voted to **DENY** protections from those with pre-existing conditions

**On equal pay:**
He voted **AGAINST** giving women a fair paycheck for equal work

**On women 's rights:**
He voted **AGAINST** the Violence Against Women Reauthorization Act

**On the environment:**
He voted to **STRIP** clean water protections from the Clean Water Rule

**On democracy reforms:**
He voted to **PROTECT** corporate PACs and dark money

| ********[Chip in to defeat Vern »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

It's really simple, folks. The Vern Buchanan anti-woman, anti-environment, anti-health care agenda does not represent our values -- and now he has to go.

We deserve someone who will work for all of us on the issues that keep you and me up at night -- like Red Tide, prescription drug costs, and public education.

[**So team, I need you to support our campaign with a donation today. We need to raise $13,268 before tomorrow 's public fundraising deadline. I hope you'll see our vision for change is worth the investment. >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $15 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all_15)
---
[Express Donate $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all_25)
[Express Donate $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all_50)
[Express Donate $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all_100)
[Or, a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

Together, we can flip this district. Thank you!

_\-- Margaret_

********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9xEw3iPSKeMX_EJNgphhURxZ2Ir2oe6wJQWOrPHkhAM=/qVXLBVvjiOUSaWouLOWtka80p-dpXwiSV1KR9krR_Hg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.29_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********

name: Kristen Foca
subject: We're not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so the only way we'll win is if you chip in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
The public FEC fundraising deadline is tomorrow. We can either hit our goal, or not. And we're counting on you to help us achieve what we set out to do.
|
---

| | Kristen here, friends, checking in. I wanted to let you know what's at stake with tomorrow's public FEC fundraising deadline. **Option A:** We hit our goal. We celebrate. The pundits take notice. And Stephanie gets a huge boost to her campaign. **Option B:** We don't hit our goal. We worry. The pundits take notice here, too. And we're behind the eight ball until our next quarterly deadline. [**Since we're not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, we are relying on you to get us over the finish line. If you can chip in before it's too late, Stephanie and I would deeply appreciate it:**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0af/522d4087/7afde322/4f343433/1439519634/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190929_em") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10 TODAY](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0af/522d4087/7afde322/4f343432/1439519634/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190929_em_abx_10")**
---
**[DONATE $25 TODAY](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0af/522d4087/7afde322/4f343431/1439519634/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190929_em_abx_25")**
---
**[DONATE $50 TODAY](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0af/522d4087/7afde322/4f343430/1439519634/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20190929_em_abx_50")**
---
**[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0af/522d4087/7afde322/4f34342f/1439519634/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190929_em_abx_other")**
---
Why is this important? Because this district is ready for change. It's ready for a representative who will stand up for human rights and stand against Donald Trump -- not the other way around.
It's also the district that's elected Chris Smith every two years since November 1980. We have our work cut out for us, and any setback we have now is going to cost us.
Can Stephanie count on your support today? Chip in now:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/schmid-founding-donor](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0af/522d4087/7afde322/4f34342e/1439519634/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=20190929_em_link")**
This one's urgent,
Kristen Foca
Deputy Campaign Manager
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. ---
I have a critical favor to ask:

[**_I'm asking you to chip in $5 before my friend Ben Ray Luj an's end-of-quarter deadline. New Mexicans and I are banding together before his deadline to ensure Ben Ray wins his critical Senate race and ousts Mitch McConnell. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b1_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I've known Ben Ray for a long time, so believe me when I tell you he's a fighter.

I watched him lead the fight to take back the House for Democrats and the American people.

I watched him fight to bring justice and equality to all people through his platform as Assistant Speaker of the U.S. House and the highest-ranking Hispanic in Congress.

And I watched him fight to pave the way for candidates like me to become one of the first Native American women in Congress.

**I know he 's our best chance to win the Senate, too -- that's why New Mexicans and I are joining forces to help Ben Ray reach his critical end-of-quarter goal.**

Look, this race is the most competitive open Senate seat in the country.

So I'll be honest: If we don't put everything we have into winning here in New Mexico, it will be very difficult to defeat Mitch McConnell's Senate nationwide.

Ben Ray's facing a massive end-of-quarter deadline, and I want to give him every resource he needs to beat back Republicans' attacks and win.

It would mean so much to me if you'd chip in $5 for Ben Ray's monumental Senate race before his deadline in 24 hours.

| ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b1_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b1_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b1_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b1_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b1_haaland_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

Thank you,

Deb Haaland

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b493/18e32a7f/531a33c5/7b0df924/3533728158/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b493/18e32a7f/531a33c5/7b0df925/3533728158/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b493/18e32a7f/531a33c5/7b0df9da/3533728158/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b493/18e32a7f/531a33c5/7b0df9db/3533728158/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b493/18e32a7f/531a33c5/7b0df9d8/3533728158/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b493/18e32a7f/531a33c5/7b0df9d9/3533728158/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Give me a chance to explain why this email is so important
body:
I'm about to ask you to make a contribution.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c64/4bef7a87/6b663d75/287f3801/633331098/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
In just a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request - especially today - is so important.
Tomorrow at midnight, we have a big FEC fundraising deadline. After it hits, my team will have to report not just how much money we raised, but how many individual contributions we've received so far.
I'll be honest, all eyes are on us right now. The press is watching, and so is the national Republican establishment. They know Susan Collins is vulnerable, and they're looking to see whether our campaign has what it takes to finally beat her.
The answer is _yes,_ we do. But in order to prove it, we need to present a really good number when this FEC report goes public. That's why I have to ask:
[**Make a $3 contribution before our FEC deadline tomorrow at midnight. I 'm not taking any money from corporate PACs, so every individual donation makes a big difference. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c64/4bef7a87/6b663d75/287f3800/633331098/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190929-1-full")
I am so proud not just of all we've accomplished these past three months, but because of the way we've chosen to run our campaign. Our commitment to fund our work through grassroots donations instead of corporate PAC money might make our jobs a little harder, but it's more than worth it.
All my best
_Sara_
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c64/4bef7a87/6b663d75/287f3800/633331098/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190929-1-full")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c64/4bef7a87/6b663d75/287f3807/633331098/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c64/4bef7a87/6b663d75/287f3806/633331098/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Thank you to everyone who is standing with us and showing the rest of America that we still believe there is hope for our future. If you haven’t raised your hand yet, what are you waiting for? Jump on in, the water’s fine (not to mention reaching this goal is very important!). Hope you have a great Sunday, Bill | | Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

subject: Why I am Running in this Swing District
body:
| | | | [ ](https://twitter.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=004218d27cababe4c94f00355&id=5cd6775cae&e=c901a073c7)
---
| | | **As a former journalist, international speaker on foreign election interference, and educator, I know we are facing an unprecedented, perilous time for our democracy.

While it was not always the top polling issues, I stuck to my conviction that foreign election interference was and will continue to remain a top national security threat. Now with the Ukraine news, we see Trump is indeed using a foreign power again to interfere in the next election.

There is too much at stake. We need new leaders to rise up that understand the urgency of this moment. That is why I am running in this critical swing district in Texas.

[Can I count on you for your support before our FEC deadline tomorrow? My primary opponent is targeting big dollar donors, and I need your help to stay in the race so I can fight for our democracy and all Texans.](https://twitter.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=004218d27cababe4c94f00355&id=21622ad22b&e=c901a073c7)

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Liz Wahl**

I'm pleased to announce that we have a generous donor willing to match all donations under $100 to our campaign for today only. I'm so lucky to have such generous people behind me, [but this will only work if more people chip in.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616466b/1e3760f0/691943fd/5f7efd80/1754157229/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1909-dd-wc?refcode=190929-email-am&recurring=auto")

name: Dick Durbin
subject: It has been a big week, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
It seemed like every hour this week another news story broke that demonstrated exactly why we need to not only defeat President Trump, but take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell in 2020.
With a Democratic Senate, we'll finally overcome the corruption and obstruction that are hallmarks of the Trump Administration and the Republican Party. But if we come up short, our hands will be tied while the GOP endangers our democracy and threatens our future.
**[There's no path to a Senate majority if we don't win right here in Illinois. I'm up against a huge FEC deadline and need you to show your support for my campaign now more than ever. Can you contribute $5 now to help me meet my fundraising goal?](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I can promise you this--this won't be the last week when President Trump's corrupt behavior tests our institutions or undermines our values.
But if we keep on track with our goals, victory is within our reach next year. We can take back the White House and elect a Democratic Senate majority, but we can only do it if we stand together and show Republicans that we're ready for the fight of our lives.
**[Peter, can I count on you to contribute $5 before the urgent FEC end-of-quarter deadline?](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-sept-2019?refcode=em190929am&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *

Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c0c/42ab3cf4/61f40cf9/135d454a/42184695/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

Today, we’re just asking if you’ll be one of those clutch contributors before our Monday midnight deadline. [ ]This is the most critical FEC deadline Beto’s ever faced, and we need your help. Please make your $3 donation as soon as possible. Thank you for your continued support. Team Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: James Mackler
subject: Serving Tennesseans vs. serving the president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Hagerty has made it clear that he's running for Senate to serve and stand with Donald Trump -- no matter what.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa224/18d6a294/4ce50921/26d6465b/87484029/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | | | **FEC DEADLINE: TOMORROW** This is our first challenge since Trump's hand-picked candidate finally announced he's running against James. | | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa224/18d6a294/4ce50921/26d64658/87484029/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190929?refcode=jme190929_m&recurring=true")
---
Tennesseans all across our state tell me they're sick of career politicians not listening to them. They're fed up with folks putting partisanship ahead of people while Tennesseans suffer the consequences.
We have rural hospitals closing, opioids are ravaging our communities, and the trade war that already hurt us more than any other state is getting worse. But my opponent Bill Hagerty says everything is great and promises more of the same.
Why? Well, after Hagerty raised all this money for Trump's election, helped fill Trump's cabinet with lobbyists and other Washington elites, and secured himself a cushy diplomatic job overseas, he's reaped all the rewards of his blind loyalty. Since entering the race, Hagerty has made it clear that he's running for Senate to serve and stand with Donald Trump -- _**no matter what.**_
That's not the job, and we can't afford to elect another senator who only cares about pleasing the president.
I'm running for Senate to serve all Tennesseans.
[_**Will you step up and make a contribution before tomorrow's deadline? It would mean so much to our campaign.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa224/18d6a294/4ce50921/26d64659/87484029/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTA5MjkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme190929?refcode=jme190929_m&recurring=true")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Military families need our help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Earlier this month, Trump decided to build his border wall with funds meant to build schools for military families and improve housing on bases across the globe. Then, his Secretary of Defense said other countries should pay for these improvements instead of the U.S., reneging on promises made to American service families. After the shock of this decision, children of service members became the next target of his draconian, bigoted views on citizenship. He now wants to deny the children of military families and foreign service officers working overseas citizenship under certain conditions. This right to American citizenship should be automatic for children of service members, but Trump has once again shown that he does not value service and sacrifice \-- he only values unquestioning loyalty to his racist, xenophobic administration. [**Today, we 're asking you to add your name to ours and demand the Trump administration restore citizenship rights to ALL children of U.S. citizens stationed abroad. We must stand up for military families and speak out against Trump's mistreatment of our service members!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2d/6e9863e8/153daa3f/1db0d23b/610520263/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/citizenship-military-kids/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thanks for standing with us! The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2d/6e9863e8/153daa3f/1db0d23b/610520263/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/citizenship-military-kids/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

This right to American citizenship should be automatic for children of service members, but Trump has once again shown that he does not value service and sacrifice \-- he only values unquestioning loyalty to his racist, xenophobic administration. "" Thanks for standing with us! The WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Look, I'll be totally honest.

**Beating Donald Trump is meaningless if we can't take back Mitch McConnell's Senate.**

Everything we're fighting for:

Health care. Voting rights. The Supreme Court. Election security. Social Security. Women's rights. LGBTQ+ rights... and so much more.

It is all dead in the water if we can't oust McConnell and defeat his obstructionist Republican Senate.

But Donald Trump just swooped into my home state and pledged to flip New Mexico red. This would devastate our chance to win the Senate.

That's why I'm asking for your help. I need 1,267 gifts to meet my massive end-of-quarter deadline in 24 hours.

Can I count on your help to win this race and end Mitch McConnell's chokehold on the Senate once and for all? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b2_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b490/18e32a7f/531f763e/7b0da4be/3344217913/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b490/18e32a7f/531f763e/7b0da4bf/3344217913/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b490/18e32a7f/531f763e/7b0da4bc/3344217913/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Gravel?=
subject: FEC deadline! [this Monday]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee for Peace, Justice, and Mike Gravel, a grassroots committee centered on Senator Mike Gravel
body:
Democratic socialist challenging New Dems chair |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,
You might have seen the [Twitter live](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=ec17b3586b&e=85f7472d66) I did with Rebecca Parson, a queer democratic socialist running for Congress in Washington’s 6th Congressional District.
[Rebecca is running](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=4f6c35f879&e=85f7472d66) because in her safely Democratic, working-class district, people are suffering. In one town, Aberdeen, 1 in 16 people are homeless and 28% of people are on food stamps. Across the district, people are dying because they don’t have healthcare.
Meanwhile Rebecca’s opponent, Derek Kilmer, rakes in millions from the military-industrial complex, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and insurance companies. He took $10K from Raytheon one year and the next year cosponsored a bill authorizing $286 million for the development of a new Israeli missile defense program under Raytheon.
Rebecca grew up overseas while her father was in the foreign service, and coming back to America, she saw the stark contrast between our ideals and our reality. This shaped her desire to fight for a more just nation. One that doesn’t tell poor people that the only way to get healthcare, an education, and a decent life is to be cannon fodder for the war machine. One that provides healthcare, food, housing, education, and a job to all.
Rebecca is the only candidate in her race fighting for:
* National rent control
* 12 million new units of social housing in the next 10 years
* A foreign policy of peace and human rights
* The Green New Deal with a federal jobs guarantee
* Medicare for All
* $15+ federal minimum wage floor (more in high-cost areas)
* Canceling student debt
* Starting salary of $60K for all public school teachers
* Abolishing private prisons
* Just cause for eviction

Our country needs these policies, but as the _**9th most conservative Democrat**_ in the House, Corporate Kilmer is never going to fight for them. That’s why we need Rebecca in Congress to replace him.
Just like our campaign, Rebecca is funded entirely by grassroots donors. This Monday, September 30th, is her first ever FEC filing deadline, but she hasn’t met her fundraising goal yet. Unlike her opponent, Rebecca doesn’t beg corporate PACs or lobbyists for money, so I’m asking you:
[Can you chip in any amount you can today to help Rebecca meet her FEC deadline?](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=6912fa5491&e=85f7472d66)
You’ll be joining hundreds of progressives across the country who have already donated to Rebecca. With your help, Rebecca will be able to build a robust ground-game in her district and send an unmistakable message to her corrupt opponent: your days are numbered, and we progressives are fired up and coming to replace you.
Derek Kilmer is the powerful chair of the centrist New Democrats Coalition in Congress and also belongs to the Problem Solvers Caucus, which is funded by Republican billionaires and dark money and pushes for conservative policies. He is actively angling to be the leader of the corporate Democrats — and Speaker of the House someday.
[Let’s kick him out and replace him with a working-class democratic soclialist to fight for peace, M4A, and the GND. ](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=c5b752fbb8&e=85f7472d66)
Thanks for all you do.
-Mike P.S. Rebecca was just endorsed by Our Revolution Washington and the People’s Policy Project! Just one more shot across the bow to Kilmer and the rest of the establishment that this is a serious campaign and Rebecca is going to win. Give them more proof here: ⇒ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rebeccaforwa-email](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=141bf351ba&e=85f7472d66)
---
| [ ](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=3082a504fb&e=85f7472d66)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Michigan is a key battleground in the fight for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek,

I'm writing to ask you to contribute to Gary Peters' campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. But first, let me tell you why I think this is so important -- and why a Senator from Virginia is writing to you about a campaign in Michigan. If you've followed the last few election cycles closely, you know that as goes Michigan, so goes the nation. That's why this campaign is so important. And it's why so many in the country will be focused on this race in the months to come. Democrats have a real shot at taking back a majority in the Senate in 2020. And I don't have to tell you what that would mean for protecting and expanding affordable health care and taking meaningful action to address the scourge of gun violence in our communities. **[But none of that can happen if we don't win in Michigan and send Gary Peters back to the Capitol. Can you help by contributing $10 or more today?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1715/3e0906/78c07a0d/3e30f190/509474411/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-gp?refcode=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+But+none+of+that+can+happen+if+we+dont+w&utm_campaign=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&source=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $10**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1715/3e0906/78c07a0d/3e30f197/509474411/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-gp?refcode=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&source=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP")
---
| [**DONATE $20**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1715/3e0906/78c07a0d/3e30f196/509474411/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-gp?refcode=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+20&utm_campaign=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&source=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1715/3e0906/78c07a0d/3e30f195/509474411/VEsC/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-gp?refcode=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&source=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1715/3e0906/78c07a0d/3e30f194/509474411/VEsD/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-GP?express_lane=true&refcode=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&source=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP")
---
Derek, as Gary's colleague, I've been so impressed with his ability to avoid the partisan bickering that plagues Washington and focus on getting results for the people he represents. We need his voice -- and his vote -- in the Senate.
It's a safe bet that Gary's opponent will be well-funded. And national Republicans have already made it clear that Michigan is their top target in 2020. They'll have more than enough special-interest cash to spread lies about the important work Gary has done in the Senate.
But the good news is that Gary has you -- that's why I hope you'll chip in whatever you can to help make sure he's re-elected next November.
******[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1715/3e0906/78c07a0d/3e30f1eb/509474411/VEsA/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-gp?refcode=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP&source=20190929_5_FR_TK_GP")******
---
Thank you for all you're doing.
-Tim Kaine

* * *

clean_body: | | Derek, I'm writing to ask you to contribute to Gary Peters' campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. But first, let me tell you why I think this is so important -- and why a Senator from Virginia is writing to you about a campaign in Michigan. If you've followed the last few election cycles closely, you know that as goes Michigan, so goes the nation. That's why this campaign is so important. And it's why so many in the country will be focused on this race in the months to come. Democrats have a real shot at taking back a majority in the Senate in 2020. And I don't have to tell you what that would mean for protecting and expanding affordable health care and taking meaningful action to address the scourge of gun violence in our communities. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" Derek, as Gary's colleague, I've been so impressed with his ability to avoid the partisan bickering that plagues Washington and focus on getting results for the people he represents. We need his voice -- and his vote -- in the Senate. It's a safe bet that Gary's opponent will be well-funded. And national Republicans have already made it clear that Michigan is their top target in 2020. They'll have more than enough special-interest cash to spread lies about the important work Gary has done in the Senate. But the good news is that Gary has you -- that's why I hope you'll chip in whatever you can to help make sure he's re-elected next November. **** ""** Thank you for all you're doing. -Tim Kaine | "" "" ""

name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: One more day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Our fundraising goal for the quarter is in reach, but we're counting on people like you stepping up to help. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6de/1205374731/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

We're closing in on our first FEC fundraising deadline, and I wanted to take a minute to reach out.

**Our fundraising goal for the quarter is within reach, and we 're counting on people like you stepping up to help.** [**_Will you chip in whatever you can before the deadline at midnight tomorrow?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190929_RH_20190929-fr-RH-deadlinegoal-all_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

John and I have been so moved by the support we've seen since we launched this campaign.

It's been amazing to see so many people fired up to win back this Senate seat and elect someone like John who has spent years fighting for and achieving real, meaningful change in Colorado.

He's going to be a senator who will fight to fundamentally change the way Washington works--but what will get him there is your support.

[**_Before Monday night 's FEC deadline, can you chip in to help reach our goal?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190929_RH_20190929-fr-RH-deadlinegoal-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you so much,
Robin [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190929_RH_20190929-fr-RH-deadlinegoal-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6db/1205374731/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6d8/1205374731/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6d9/1205374731/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6d6/1205374731/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6d7/1205374731/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6d4/1205374731/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714aa/691c9bd/6e239615/11a7a6db/1205374731/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: MT (personal)
subject: before the weekend is over
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
Peter – Sorry to be emailing on a
Sunday, I’ll get right to the point: we’re about 24 hours out
from the most important public FEC deadline we’ve faced, and
we’re not where we need to be.

Please, dig deep and give whatever you can to help close the
gap: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept19-eoq
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-sept19-eoq?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190929_2_8&amount=20.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

The GOP began ramping up their spending against Democrats as
soon as we took the House. We need to step up and protect
vulnerable House Democrats in tough races everywhere to hold on
to our majority.

Thanks,

Mike

name: Team Tina
subject: Tomorrow's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Tina's been there for us when we've needed her most -- now let's be there for her. Monday is our first FEC deadline with an opponent, and we still need to raise $40,788.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929eoq4-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

We don't have any room for error here.

**The only way we can protect this Senate seat and give Democrats a shot at taking back the Senate is if you give $10 _right_ now. [Please give everything you can.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929eoq4-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Jason Lewis is counting on us to take this race for granted.

Mitch McConnell would LOVE it if we just called it a day while he points his money machine at Minnesota.

Donald Trump would be THRILLED if we sat back so he could turn Minnesota red (especially since he's holding a massive rally here on October 10th).

**We've worked too hard raising our voices to slow down now. And Tina's been there for us when we've needed her most -- now we need to be there for her and make sure she stands strong against Jason Lewis in this race. Because with you, the Republicans don't stand a chance.**

**Tomorrow is our first FEC deadline since Jason Lewis got in this race. So we're coming to you now:[Pitch in $10 to help raise the $40,788 we still need to close the gap in our end-of-quarter fundraising. And to make sure this Senate seat stays blue and that we can take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929eoq4-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc411de/c1f7015/674b4cd3/1145b5f6/796113637/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkyOWVvcTQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190929eoq4-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP closes polling places to silence voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, After the Supreme Court ruled that a key part of the Voting Rights Act was unconstitutional in 2013, the floodgates opened for states to pass restrictions on voting rights that disenfranchise minority voters and help keep the GOP in power. In the six years since that fateful decision, GOP legislatures and election offices closed 1,688 poll sites in 13 states, with many closed sites clustered in the South. In Texas alone, they shut down 750 polling places. In some Texas counties, that's left upwards of 75% of polling stations closed \-- which is especially disastrous in rural countries where voters must take off work, drive long distances, and wait in long lines just to exercise their Constitutional right to vote. Expanding voting rights should be a goal no matter what party you belong to \-- yet Republican-controlled state legislatures are overseeing this sweeping dismantlement of voting rights across the country. They are gerrymandering their states' election maps, creating poll taxes, and blocking automatic voter registration, all in an attempt to pick and choose the electorate. Republicans know that their ideas aren't winning over any voters, so they now resort to silencing anyone who won't vote for them instead \-- and Democrats need to stand up to their blatant voter suppression. We need to rally and push back against the GOP's onslaught of attacks on democracy, and the only way we'll do this is vote them out and win these legislatures back. [**WDTO is ready to fight against the GOP for control of state legislatures, and we know they 're going to throw millions of dollars in dark money into every election they can, so we need your help. Please, every donation made, no matter how small, will go toward making true, lasting change in our elections. Could you support us with a donation of $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2e/6e9863e8/153f3b82/1db0d238/990589007/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190929c.ND-b&refcode2=VM2GsuhzrOydz0S4tx6P") Thank you for standing with us! -The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd2e/6e9863e8/153f3b82/1db0d238/990589007/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190929c.ND-b&refcode2=VM2GsuhzrOydz0S4tx6P")

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Will you help us demonstrate the grassroots power behind our campaign?
body:
We've got one more day.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c69/4bef7a87/6b7977a1/287f396e/387053022/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Hi-
Tomorrow is a big day for us. Want to know why?
Because we have an important FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow at **MIDNIGHT.** When it's over, our goal is to file a really impressive fundraising report with as many individual donations as possible.
Will you help us demonstrate the grassroots power behind this campaign? [**Add your contribution before our FEC deadline tomorrow at midnight -> **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c69/4bef7a87/6b7977a1/287f396d/387053022/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190929-2-full")
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c69/4bef7a87/6b7977a1/287f396c/387053022/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190929-2-full")
This isn't just about scaring our opponents with a really great fundraising report (although we have to admit, that's a plus!)
It's about making sure we have the resources we need to stay competitive in this race.
Ours is one of the closest Senate races in the country - _Cook Political Report_ ranked us a "toss-up." That means Mitch McConnell and national Republican donors are going to throw huge amounts of money at Collins' campaign in order to help her win.
**It 's going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to make sure we can keep up. We're hoping you can help with that. **
[**Chip in whatever you can afford before our FEC deadline on Monday. Any amount brings us one step closer to winning this race.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c69/4bef7a87/6b7977a1/287f396c/387053022/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190929-2-full")
Thanks in advance for chipping in. We can't do this without you.
All our best,
Team Sara
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c69/4bef7a87/6b7977a1/287f396c/387053022/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190929-2-full")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine

South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: one day left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, I hate to come to you like this, but with tomorrow being the biggest FEC deadline of our campaign so far, I've got no choice.
In this email, I'm going to ask you one more time to pitch in before this big FEC deadline. But first, I want to be really clear about what will happen if we miss our goal.
Just last month, President Trump came to New Hampshire to personally recruit his former campaign manager Corey Lewandowski to run against me. That's the same Corey Lewandowski who was responsible for putting Trump into the White House in the first place -- and now Trump is returning the favor.
Even worse, the GOP is dumping money into this race to help defeat me: Outside groups are spending more against me than all other in-cycle Democratic senators combined.
And I can't say I'm surprised. With CBS News reporting that New Hampshire could decide Senate control, the GOP is desperate to flip this seat and keep their Senate majority. **The only way we defeat the GOP and take back the Senate is if we hit every single fundraising goal -- but with just one day to go until our most important FEC deadline yet, we're still very short.**
**Look, missing this goal could put our chances in real danger. So I 'm counting on you to come through right now.**
[**Please click here to give before our FEC deadline and help take back the Senate for Democrats.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3ec/2a380d31/3d9078ed/f0d6b0/4179022370/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA5MjlfTVdINENKU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190929_MWH4CJS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Every grassroots dollar is going to matter here -- and I just couldn't do this without you. Thank you, everyone.
Jeanne
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3ec/2a380d31/3d9078ed/f0d6b0/4179022370/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA5MjlfTVdINENKU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190929_MWH4CJS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

| Political insiders want to make you believe we can't win this race. Arkansas is just "too red."

Here's the truth, team: We live in a red state where a majority of the voters are not voting for Republicans. Or for Democrats. They're not voting at all. To win, we have to go talk to those voters, and that's going to take a lot of hard work.

**Josh has never been afraid of hard work, but our team can't do it alone. And that means hitting our $20,000 end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising goal so we have the resources to reach the voters who have been left behind.**
