clean_body: | "=" | Political insiders want to make you believe we can't win this race. Arkansas is just "too red." Here's the truth, team: We live in a red state where a majority of the voters are not voting for Republicans. Or for Democrats. They're not voting at all. To win, we have to go talk to those voters, and that's going to take a lot of hard work. Josh has never been afraid of hard work, but our team can't do it alone. And that means hitting our $20,000 end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising goal so we have the resources to reach the voters who have been left behind. "=" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" "=" We deserve a better Arkansas and MUCH better representation in Washington. Let's put in the work to get it, Team Mahony | | Josh Mahony is a native Arkansan, non-profit leader and long-time business owner. He's running to replace Tom Cotton and make sure everyday Arkansans have a voice in the Senate. If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. "=" PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U.S. SENATE Mahony for Senate P.O. Box 1884 Fayetteville, AR 72702 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I wouldn't be asking if it weren't powerfully important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I know what's broken, and I know how to fix it. I know how to fight, and I know how to win. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bbb/45c30650/10b93d0cc/668f234c/2025673604/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In 2008, when Wall Street crashed the economy and millions of American families lost their jobs, their homes, and their savings, I went to Washington to take on the big banks -- and I beat them.

And in 2012, when Washington Republicans were working for big banks instead of working people, I took on one of their popular senators in Massachusetts -- and I beat him.

**I know what's broken, and I know how to fix it. I know how to fight, and I know how to win.**

But I know that it's only possible if we work together. That's the only way we've won before -- by fighting side by side.

**We're less than 48 hours from a crucial fundraising deadline, and if you've been waiting for a good time to join the movement, your help now is more crucial than ever.

[I wouldn't be asking if it weren't powerfully important. Can you chip in $3 or anything you can today before tomorrow's midnight deadline to help push this movement forward?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bbb/45c30650/10b93d0cc/668f234f/2025673604/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMVVGX0VPUV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MDkyOV9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1UF_EOQ_GRM_E_20190929_V1S2_P_T2")**
| _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: $3](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bbb/45c30650/10b93d0cc/668f234e/2025673604/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMVVGX0VPUV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MDkyOV9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=EMJ1UF_EOQ_GRM_E_20190929_V1S2_P_T2")
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bbb/45c30650/10b93d0cc/668f234f/2025673604/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMVVGX0VPUV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MDkyOV9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1UF_EOQ_GRM_E_20190929_V1S2_P_T2")
---
>
We're going to build a grassroots movement that's strong enough to make big, structural change so our economy, our government, and our democracy work for everyone -- not just the wealthy and well-connected.

Every day, Americans are fighting to demand change and a better future for their families and communities. In the past few weeks, we've seen the Chicago Teachers Union preparing to strike to demand better conditions for their students, GM workers strike for good benefits and fair wages, and millions of young people worldwide strike for a solution to the climate crisis.

Our campaign is about putting power in the hands of working people, not catering to the rich and powerful. That's why I don't hold closed-door fundraisers or call wealthy donors for money. A political system that is beholden to big donors will never represent the interests of working Americans, and this is a people-powered movement.

**[So, that's why I need to ask for your help now. We need everyone in this fight. Can you chip in whatever you can today to help reach our goal before midnight tomorrow?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bbb/45c30650/10b93d0cc/668f234f/2025673604/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMVVGX0VPUV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MDkyOV9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1UF_EOQ_GRM_E_20190929_V1S2_P_T2")**

I believe in how we're doing this, and I believe in our power together. We truly make each other stronger.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529bbb/45c30650/10b93d0cc/668f234f/2025673604/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KMVVGX0VPUV9HUk1fRV8yMDE5MDkyOV9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ1UF_EOQ_GRM_E_20190929_V1S2_P_T2")

body:
|

Did you catch this email from Bill this morning? We’re just as shocked as your are to see that we’re already over half way to our goal. **We can’t wait to see how many Americans have raised their hand when this is all said and done Tuesday morning.** [**If you haven’t joined the chorus of Americans who still have hope for our country, we ask that you please consider joining them now. ⇒**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDOYKCdThDtrNz6z21Ohppg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190929_2&n=1) — Team Weld | | [RAISE YOUR HAND ⇒](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDOYKCdThDtrNz6z21Ohppg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190929_2&n=2)

**From** : Bill Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : September 29, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCDOYKCdThDtrNz6z21Ohppg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190929_2&n=3)
When I woke up this morning I couldn’t believe what my team was telling me. In the last 48 hours,**thousands of folks like you have raised your hand and brought us half way to our goal of raising $50,000 by Monday at midnight.**
Thank you to everyone who is standing with us and showing the rest of America that we still believe there is hope for our future.
If you haven’t raised your hand yet, **what are you waiting for?** Jump on in, the water’s fine (_not to mention reaching this goal is very important!_).
Hope you have a great Sunday,
Bill

name: MCCONNELL DEFEATED (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: news just broke:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | This changes everything:

The latest Morning Consult poll named Mitch McConnell the most unpopular senator by a landslide.

He's never been more at risk of losing his seat.

This is the most important deadline we've ever faced.

**Because this is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to oust McConnell and defeat his entire Republican Senate.**

That's why we MUST win Ben Ray's race in New Mexico! If we can't win here, McConnell is all but guaranteed to stay in power.

Ben Ray's 1,093 gifts short of his critical end-of-quarter goal. Can you rush in $5? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190929_em_fr_b3_mdv_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b491/18e32a7f/5363bc6a/7b0d921a/1316633623/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b491/18e32a7f/5363bc6a/7b0d921b/1316633623/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b491/18e32a7f/5363bc6a/7b0d9218/1316633623/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b491/18e32a7f/5363bc6a/7b0d9219/1316633623/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b491/18e32a7f/5363bc6a/7b0d921e/1316633623/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b491/18e32a7f/5363bc6a/7b0d921f/1316633623/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: My hope and my concern about this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639113d/55b66746/2c6e8acf/80c96e8/412802254/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | As I prepared to run for the Senate, I talked to hundreds of working people over the last few months, and I heard the message loud and clear: **_It's time to restore government by the people, for the people._** Since the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision almost a decade ago, control of our democracy has slipped _from_ the hands of the people, and into the pockets of wealthy special interests. Those special interests have gotten used to calling the shots - especially with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump ready to grant their every wish. But really, **lawmakers on both sides of the aisle have gotten too reliant on third party interests spending on their behalf.** Which is why, in my race for the U.S. Senate, I'm calling on my primary opponents to take the _People's Pledge_ to reject _any_ outside spending in this race. If a third party does spend any money to boost a campaign, that candidate will donate fifty cents on the dollar to a charity agreed on by all candidates. **That means I'm counting on your support: I'm relying on grassroots donations and individual contributions to grow this campaign and win this race.[Donate $3 today and let's kick things off together.](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639113d/55b66746/2c6e8acf/80c96e9/412802254/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-09-29-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3")** **My hope:** that my primary opponents will join me in taking this grassroots pledge, and this campaign will be a fantastic debate of ideas and philosophies. **My concern:** that they continue to refuse to take the pledge, and the debate will be drowned out in a wave of special interest dollars. If we're going to break this cycle, we've got to step up and _do things differently_. That's where you come in. Let's send a message with our grassroots energy before the critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. [**_We're just 266 grassroots donations shy of our first quarterly goal. _**](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639113d/55b66746/2c6e8acf/80c96e9/412802254/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-09-29-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3")**[_**Pleas**_](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639113d/55b66746/2c6e8acf/80c96e9/412802254/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-09-29-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3")e chip in $3 before tomorrow night's deadline to get us across the finish line.** Onward, _Joe_ Express
